title: BACAP: Slop Edition
description: "BACAP: Slop Edition" is an unofficial add-on for The BlazeandCave's Advancements Pack that adds over 60 new advancements
body:
# BACAP: Slop Edition
"BACAP: Slop Edition" is an unofficial add-on for [The BlazeandCave's Advancements Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blazeandcaves-advancements-pack) that adds over 60 new advancements
# Features
[List with every advancement](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1vSFdYO-YhWehy9CBp8w_jug3-FL2r46WHYDtjy12yfg/edit?usp=sharing)
# How to Install
For a new world: You can click the "Data Packs" option when creating a new world. Upon doing this, either open the world folder and copy in the zipped file, or click and drag the zipped file directly into the menu. Once it is imported, hover over the icon for BACAP: Slop Edition so an arrow appears, then click the arrow to load the datapack.

For an existing world: Click on the world in the singleplayer menu, then click "Edit", then "Open World Folder". Then go into the "datapacks" folder, and copy and paste the zipped file from the download here.

Once the datapack is installed, go into the world. A message should pop up saying you are using BlazeandCave's advancements pack. If not, check your advancements menu. You should see the custom tab named "BlazeandCave's Advancements."
# Updating to a Newer Version
1️⃣ Leave your world for upmost safety and do not rejoin during the process. If you are updating on a server, we recommend you plan for downtime.

2️⃣ Make a backup of your world in case you screw up. If the world is hosted on a server, save it either on the server's FTP or your computer.

3️⃣ Delete the old datapacks COMPLETELY from your world.

4️⃣ Copy and paste in the new updated datapacks.

5️⃣ Go into your world.

6️⃣ If you screwed up, go to your backup, make a backup of your backup, then repeat steps 3-6 on the backup.
# Bugs or Improvements
If you have any questions, bugs or suggestions you can [join the discord server](https://discord.gg/FKH5X4DXVa)
